_provenance: hand-derived from specs/03 §2.4 + specs/15 §4.1; Go extraction deferred to X-cross-cutting
name: fixed_array
value_desc: struct { id: [u8;4] = [0xAA,0xBB,0xCC,0xDD] } -> version(0000) + 4 raw bytes (no length prefix)

name: vec_u8
value_desc: struct { data: Vec<u8> = [01,02,03] } -> version(0000) + u32 count(00000003) + raw bytes(010203)

name: vec_struct
value_desc: struct { items: Vec<Pair> = [Pair{1,2}, Pair{3,4}] } -> version + u32 count(00000002) + Pair(0001 0002) + Pair(0003 0004)

name: interface_typeid
value_desc: Iface::Pair(Pair{9,10}) typeID=7 -> version + u32 typeID(00000007) + Pair(0009 000A)

name: map
value_desc: struct { m: BTreeMap<u16,u16> = {1:100, 2:200} } -> version + u32 count(00000002) + sorted entries [key 0001 val 0064][key 0002 val 00C8]
